headline: Jim Cramer Breaks Down the Data Center Growth Story for Generac Holdings
summary: Jim Cramer reviewed Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE:GNRC) while breaking down 16 stocks for a market facing higher energy costs and economic uncertainty. Cramer explained why the stock recently sold off, as he commented: Today, one of our favorites, Generac Holdings, the maker of backup power generators for both housing and the data center, held an […]

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Generac Holdings, Raises Price Target to $228
summary: Barclays  analyst Christine Cho   maintains Generac Holdings (NYSE:GNRC) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $213 to $228.
